stemHtml: In straight, horizontal steady flight, the function of the tailplane is to maintain equilibrium by supplying...

options.a: an up force when the Centre of Pressure is behind the CG.
options.b: an up force when the CG approaches its permissible values.
options.c: a down force when the Centre of Pressure coincides with the CG.
options.d: a down force when the Centre of Pressure is behind the CG.
